title: Quantity Surveyor
description:
Roles / Responsibilities

  • Prepare preliminary cost estimates and cost plans based on conceptual or schematic designs
  • Provide cost advice to support design and development and ensure alignment with the Client's budget
  • Advise on appropriate procurement strategies (e.g. traditional, D&B, etc.)
  • Prepare tender documents and manage tender process.
  • Participate in value engineering workships and provide cost-impact analysis
  • Assist in the negotiation and award of the Contracts
  • Monitor project cost performance and maintain cost control systems
  • Conduct regular site visits to evaluate progress claims and issue payment recommendations
  • Assess variations, and maintain updated cost reports and forecasts, including cash flow projection
  • Provide monthly cost reports, financial statements and updates to Client and Consultants
  • Prepare, negotiate and settle final accounts with Contractors
  • Attend project meetings and provide timely commercial and contractual advice

Requirements

  • Recognised Bachelor’s Degree in Building, Quantity Surveying or equivalent from recognized universities
  • Preferably with minimum of 2 years (for Junior QS) and 4 years (for QS) of QS relevant working experience with both private and public sector clients and preferably with knowledge of SIA and PSSCOC forms of contract.
  • Work experience gained from consultancy firm will be an advantage
  • Good technical knowledge for measurement, cost estimating and construction technology
  • Understand and familiar with professional practice and contract administration processes
  • Able to work as a team player and multi-task on few on-going projects/ assignments
  • Resourceful, independent, responsible and able to work in a challenging and fast paced environment

Other Information

  • 5 Days week
  • Social benefits
  • Medical benefits
  • Insurance coverage
  • Sponsorship for relevant courses
  • Sponsorship for relevant membership
  • Bonus/AWS

postedCompany.description:
As a Quantity Surveying Consultancy Firms established for 18 years, we are a team of Professional Quantity Surveyors who takes ownership and pride in our projects. We believe that strong workplace ethics must be exhibited from the top down, and the inside out.


Proper guidance will be provided for newly joined QS because we believe when you "teach a man to fish, you feed him for a lifetime". There will be opportunities to handle a variety of projects from Private to Public sectors.


As an advocate for continuous learning, we encourage our QS to constantly upgrade themselves by taking up suitable courses and aiming for Professional Certification in Quantity Surveying.


We are looking for suitable candidates to join our expanding Family to bring the company up the next level.
postedCompany.name: QS CONSULTANTS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
